postcards.tagline: A deck of memories, not a game deck
postcards.intro: Welcome to the Postcards section, the ironic gallery of VTES Italy. Cards become photographic souvenirs: shots from events, tournaments and gatherings instead of original illustrations. These are community snapshots: serious, funny or epic moments, transformed into frames familiar to game players.
postcards.why_text: Like postcards sent from a trip, meant to be shared memories: an alternative album of what makes the VTES community in Italy come alive. Browsing rediscovers friends, games, gags and small legends born around the tables.

wos.lead: The new Sabbat expansion marks a special moment: all of Italy unites to celebrate the game we love. Four decks, four paths, endless stories coming to life at club and game store tables in every city. Not just competition, but a week of gathering, discovery and shared fun, in true Cainite spirit.
wos.quote: For one week, all of Italy plays as a single coterie
wos.what_text: A national event for the Sabbat deck launch. From October 18 to 26, players compete in Sealed format, opening and playing prerelease decks simultaneously. An opportunity to try new cards, meet other Cainites, and participate in a shared national ranking in a fun atmosphere.
how_items: Each participant receives a sealed Sabbat deck (no sleeves)
Four-player tables with a different deck per Path: Caine, Cathari, Death and the Soul, Power and the Inner Voice
scores_items: Players earn Victory Points (VP) and Game Wins (GW)
Two levels: City standings + National standings by Path
After 3 rounds, total points determine the local winner (no final: experience and fun is what counts)
wos.deck_text: Participants take home their Sabbat prerelease deck as a memento of the event. Treat the cards with care: they are part of the official event kit and deserve respect... in true Sabbat style.
wos.standings_text: National deck standings are updated as results come in from local events. Only official Week of Sabbat tournaments count toward the standings.

twins.lead: The world of Vampire: The Eternal Struggle is populated by dark, enigmatic and fascinating faces. But looking closely at card illustrations, sometimes you spot surprising similarities with well-known figures: actors, musicians, politicians or pop culture icons. This section collects the coincidences in a light-hearted and ironic way.
twins.tagline: A fun way to discover that, perhaps, some vampires really do walk among us...

domains_index.subtitle: From north to south, the Italian Methuselah network is alive and thriving!
domains_index.intro_1: This page shows the active Domains: the cities where the VTES community gathers, plays, organizes tournaments and nurtures the passion for the game.
domains_index.intro_2: Whether you are an awakened ancient or a curious neonate, here you can find your domain... or invade one!
